calculator.logicDescription: Sell Value = BaseFormula(weight) × Mutation Multiplier × (1 + Friend Boost%) × Quantity. Mutations are mutually exclusive in GAG2 — only one applies per crop. Values are community-estimated and some per-crop curves remain unverified.

faqs.question: What is Grow a Garden 2?
faqs.answer: Grow a Garden 2 (GAG2) is the sequel to the popular Roblox farming game, developed by Strawberreh Squad / Splitting Point Studios. It adds a day/night cycle, guilds, weather, mutations, NPCs, and offline growth — and nothing carries over from GAG1.

faqs.question: Are mutations stackable in Grow a Garden 2?
faqs.answer: No. Unlike GAG1, mutations in GAG2 are mutually exclusive — only one mutation applies per crop at a time. Community data currently tracks values such as Aurora ×1.5, Gold ×10, Electric, Frozen, Rainbow, and Bloodlit.

faqs.question: How do I redeem codes in Grow a Garden 2?
faqs.answer: Use the in-game Settings gear and Redeem Code flow when available. The current working code is TEAMGREENBEAN for 3× Green Bean Seeds, and source notes also mention Discord and social/event code drops.

faqs.question: Can my crops be stolen?
faqs.answer: Yes. During the 2-minute night phase of the 10-minute day/night cycle, other players can loot unattended gardens. Harvest high-value crops before logging off or deploy defensive pets, plants, and gear.

faqs.question: What changed in the latest update?
faqs.answer: The Merging Update added Star Fruit, Sun Bloom, the first Secret crop Eclipse Bloom, and the Mythic Firefly pet. Homepage stats and Super crop prices were also refreshed on July 14, 2026.
